issues.description: Action sequence is reversed. Card text states: (1) add 1 card from top/bottom of Life cards to hand, then (2) add up to 1 card from top of deck to Life cards. DSL has SearchDeck before FlipLife, which is backwards.
SearchDeck with destination 'hand' is incorrect. Should add card to Life cards (top), not hand. Requires custom action or clarification of destination parameter.
FlipLife adds to hand, but source should be specified as 'top or bottom' of Life cards. Current DSL does not capture the 'may choose' optionality.

suggestedDsl.name: ST07-005
suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.
